failures.name: Heating system not working
failures.summary: The agent failed to assess the urgency appropriately by not recognizing the emergency nature of the situation.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not assess urgency.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, my furnace won’t turn on. It’s really cold in the house.
I completely understand, let me get you sorted right away. Is your system completely not working at all right now?
Yes, it’s not working at all. No heat is coming out.
Are you noticing any burning smell, gas smell, smoke, or water leaking?
No, there’s no smell or leaks. Just cold air.
Thank you for that information. I'm going to transfer you to our emergency line right now. One moment please.
I'm just going to transfer you now, one moment please.

The transfer was not able to connect. I'm really sorry about that — I wasn't able to connect you right now. 

Can I get your full name and callback number?
My name is Tom Brown, and my number is 555-444-3333.

Perfect, got it. That's Tom Brown at 555-444-3333. 

Can I have your service address, please?
Sure, it’s 654 Maple Ave, Dallas, TX.

Thank you, Tom. Just to confirm, I have Tom Brown, callback number 555-444-3333, service address 654 Maple Ave, Dallas, TX, and you need help with your furnace not turning on. Does all of that sound right?
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

all_results.name: Basic service request
all_results.summary: All required data points were captured and confirmed, and the call was closed with the scripted phrase.

all_results.name: Emergency - no heat in winter
all_results.summary: The agent identified the situation as an emergency, offered a live transfer, and handled the urgency appropriately.

all_results.name: Quote request
all_results.summary: The agent successfully routed to the install/quote path, captured the necessary information, did not provide a price, and scheduled a callback.

all_results.name: Existing customer follow-up
all_results.summary: The agent successfully routed the call to the existing customer path and captured the callback information by offering a transfer.

all_results.name: FAQ - hours inquiry
all_results.summary: The agent answered the FAQ about business hours without collecting unnecessary lead information.

all_results.name: Request live person immediately
all_results.summary: The agent offered to transfer the caller and initiated the transfer successfully.

all_results.name: AC making strange noise
all_results.summary: All required information was captured and confirmed, and a callback was scheduled without treating the situation as an emergency.

all_results.name: Heating system not working
all_results.summary: The agent failed to assess the urgency appropriately by not recognizing the emergency nature of the situation.
all_results.root_cause: The agent did not assess urgency.

all_results.name: Spam robocall
all_results.summary: The call was routed to a spam path and ended politely.

all_results.name: Wrong number
all_results.summary: The agent clarified the company type, helped redirect the caller, and did not attempt to capture a lead.

all_results.name: Maintenance request
all_results.summary: The agent successfully captured the caller's name, phone number, address, and service type, read back the full summary, and closed with the scripted phrase.

all_results.name: No cooling with burning smell
all_results.summary: The agent recognized the potential emergency, verified urgency, and offered a transfer option.

all_results.name: Callback requested
all_results.summary: The agent successfully captured minimal information, confirmed the callback, and did not pressure for more details.

all_results.name: Ductwork cleaning inquiry
all_results.summary: The agent effectively answered FAQs and captured lead information for follow-up.

all_results.name: End of call - caller decides to wait
all_results.summary: The agent acknowledged the caller's decision to wait gracefully without pushing for a callback.
